ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  "measurement_error" REAL /* Known error or uncertainty in the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "birth_location" TEXT /* Birth location of the subject */,
  "hand_preference" TEXT /* Hand preference of the subject */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject in cm */,
  "subject_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the subject */,
  "genetic_information" TEXT /* Genetic information of the subject */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who initially recorded the subject's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_category" TEXT /* Category of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the data access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the data access */,
  "data_usage" TEXT /* How the data was used after access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the version belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
